data_description.calculation_time: When to run the daily ET₀ calculation and update sensors. Evening (23:00) is recommended — temperatures are fully known, rain data is settled, and the result is ready for your morning watering automation.
data_description.notify_enabled: If enabled, a push notification is sent after each daily calculation summarising whether watering is needed.
data_description.notify_target: Select one or more notification services. If your phone foes not appear, open the Home Assistant companion app once to register it, the re-open this form.

zone_params.title: Crops & Growth Stage
zone_params.description: Select what is growing and where you are in the season.

data_description.crops: Select all crops currently growing. Kc is averaged across them.
data_description.growth_stage: Look at your plants and pick the stage that best describes them now.
data_description.stage_progress: 0% = just entered this stage. 100% = about to move to the next.
data_description.zone_area: Total area of the planted field (length × width).
data_description.flow_rate: Run the valve into a bucket for 1 minute and measure the volume — that number is your L/min.
data_description.max_bucket: Sandy soil: 15–25 mm. Loam: 40–55 mm. Clay: 55–70 mm.
data_description.low_threshold: Trigger watering when moisture drops below this. Typical: 50% of maximum.

data_description.notify_target: Select one or more notification services. If your phone does not appear, open the Home Assistant companion app once to register it, then re-open this form.

zone_params.title: Crops & Growth Stage
zone_params.description: The stage below reflects the current state based on your original planting date. Adjust if needed.
